title: Keyboard For Scroll
description:
Use keyboard buttons to scroll slot items in minecraft!
This mod make your keyboard as mouse wheel, press R to scroll right item, and V to scroll left. press X to scroll to last item.
You can change key bindings from your settings.
body:
Keyboard for scroll

If your mouse wheel is not working well, this mod will help you!

This mod adds the ability to have the slot bar go to the next item when you press the R button, go to the previous item when you press the V button, and go to the last slot item when you press the X button.

You can change key bindings in minecraft settings.
